title: Stranger Things
subtitle: S1 E1 · Chapter One: The Vanishing of Will Byers
description: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces — and one very strange little girl.

title: The Office
subtitle: S2 E4 · The Fire
description: A fire in the office forces the staff outside for the day, leading to a heated game of Desert Island and revelations about office romances.

title: Succession
subtitle: S3 E1 · Secession
description: The Roy family controls one of the biggest media and entertainment conglomerates. When Logan Roy considers retirement, a bitter family power struggle begins.
